title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXIV. Jingles.
content:
Sing jigmijole, the pudding-bowl,
            The table and the frame;
        My master he did cudgel me
            For speaking of my dame.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXIV. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
